# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a comprehensive Human Resources Management System built as a single-page application (SPA) using React and TypeScript. The application follows a modern full-stack architecture with Supabase as the backend-as-a-service provider.

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript for type safety
- **Build Tool**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes and role-based access control
- **State Management**: 
  - React Context for authentication state
  - TanStack Query (React Query) for server state management
  - Local component state with React hooks
- **UI Components**: shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS
- **Styling**: Custom design system with CSS custom properties and Tailwind utilities
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod schema validation

### Backend Architecture
- **Platform**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with 40+ tables covering all HR domains
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with custom user roles and permissions
- **Authorization**: Row Level Security (RLS) policies + application-level role checks
- **Real-time**: Supabase real-time subscriptions for live updates
- **File Storage**: Supabase Storage for documents, avatars, and attachments

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx` - Application entry point, renders React app
- `src/App.tsx` - Main application component with routing configuration
- `src/index.css` - Global styles, design tokens, and Tailwind imports

### Authentication & Authorization
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx` - Authentication context provider managing Supabase sessions
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Role-based route access control definitions
- `src/pages/Login.tsx` - Authentication login page
- `src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx` - Password reset request page
- `src/pages/SetPassword.tsx` - Password setting/reset page

### Layout Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx` - Main application layout wrapper
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx` - Collapsible sidebar navigation
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx` - Top navigation bar with breadcrumbs
- `src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx` - Notification dropdown component
- `src/components/layout/UserMenu.tsx` - User profile dropdown menu

### Feature Components
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx` - Logo component with variant support
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx` - Employee selection component with search
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx` - Employee evaluation history display
- `src/components/hr-policies/RichTextEditor.tsx` - Rich text editor using Tiptap
- `src/components/leave/ApplyLeaveModal.tsx` - Leave request modal
- `src/components/leave/LeaveBalancesTab.tsx` - Leave balance display
- `src/components/leave/MyRequestsTab.tsx` - Personal leave requests
- `src/components/leave/AllRequestsTab.tsx` - All leave requests (HR view)

### Settings Components
- `src/components/settings/CompanyTab.tsx` - Company information settings
- `src/components/settings/DepartmentsTab.tsx` - Department management
- `src/components/settings/RolesTab.tsx` - Role management
- `src/components/settings/LeaveTypesTab.tsx` - Leave type configuration
- `src/components/settings/EvaluationParametersTab.tsx` - Evaluation criteria setup
- `src/components/settings/AttendanceTab.tsx` - Attendance settings
- `src/components/settings/ExpenseCategoriesTab.tsx` - Expense category management
- `src/components/settings/NotificationsTab.tsx` - Notification preferences
- `src/components/settings/DangerZoneTab.tsx` - Account deletion/settings

### Page Components
- `src/pages/Dashboard.tsx` - Main dashboard with overview widgets
- `src/pages/Employees.tsx` - Employee listing and management
- `src/pages/EmployeeProfile.tsx` - Individual employee profile
- `src/pages/EmployeeForm.tsx` - Employee creation/editing form
- `src/pages/Settings.tsx` - Application settings page
- `src/pages/LeaveManagement.tsx` - Leave management interface
- `src/pages/Payroll.tsx` - Payroll processing and history
- `src/pages/MyPayslip.tsx` - Individual payslip view
- `src/pages/Evaluations.tsx` - Performance evaluation management
- `src/pages/Projects.tsx` - Project management
- `src/pages/Clients.tsx` - Client management
- `src/pages/Invoices.tsx` - Invoice management
- `src/pages/HrPolicies.tsx` - HR policy document management

### Utility Files
- `src/lib/utils.ts` - Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/format-date.ts` - Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/format-role.ts` - Role formatting and display logic
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Role-based access control logic
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts` - Leave calculation utilities
- `src/lib/notifications.ts` - Notification sending utilities

### Supabase Integration
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts` - Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts` - Database type definitions (40+ tables)

### Configuration Files
- `vite.config.ts` - Vite build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts` - Tailwind CSS configuration
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration
- `eslint.config.js` - ESLint configuration
- `playwright.config.ts` - End-to-end testing configuration

## Database Schema Summary

The application uses a comprehensive PostgreSQL database with 40+ tables organized by functional domains:

### Core Entities
- `companies` - Multi-tenant company information
- `employees` - Employee records with auth integration
- `roles` - User roles and permissions
- `employee_roles` - Many-to-many employee-role relationships

### HR Management
- `attendance_records` - Daily attendance tracking
- `leave_requests` - Leave application and approval workflow
- `leave_balances` - Annual leave balance tracking
- `leave_types` - Configurable leave categories
- `payroll_records` - Monthly payroll processing
- `salary_history` - Salary change tracking
- `loans` - Employee loan management

### Performance Management
- `evaluations` - Bi-annual performance reviews
- `daily_evaluations` - Daily feedback system
- `evaluation_parameters` - Custom evaluation criteria
- `evaluation_scores` - Individual evaluation scores

### Project & Client Management
- `projects` - Project tracking and management
- `clients` - Client information and billing
- `project_assignments` - Employee-project assignments
- `project_categories` - Project categorization

### Financial Management
- `invoices` - Client invoicing system
- `invoice_line_items` - Invoice line items
- `invoice_payments` - Payment tracking
- `monthly_expenses` - Operational expenses
- `expense_categories` - Expense categorization
- `office_expenses` - Office-related expenses
- `outsourcing_records` - External service tracking

### Administrative
- `hr_documents` - HR policy documents with versioning
- `public_holidays` - Holiday calendar management
- `notifications` - In-app notification system
- `company_settings` - Company-wide configuration
- `company_features` - Feature flags per company
- `admin_logs` - Administrative action logging

### Supporting Tables
- `attendance_imports` - Bulk attendance data imports
- `leave_balance_history` - Leave balance adjustment tracking
- `loan_monthly_overrides` - Loan payment overrides
- `role_feature_flags` - Role-specific feature access

## Business Logic and Data Flow

### Authentication Flow
1. User enters email/password on login page
2. Supabase Auth validates credentials and creates session
3. `useAuth` hook detects auth state change
4. Fetches employee data using `get_employee_by_auth_id` function
5. Stores user, employee, role, and company data in context
6. Redirects to dashboard or appropriate protected route

### Role-Based Access Control
- **Database Level**: RLS policies restrict data access based on company_id and user relationships
- **Application Level**: Route guards check role permissions using `canAccess()` function
- **UI Level**: Components conditionally render based on user role
- **API Level**: Supabase functions enforce business rules

### Leave Management Workflow
1. Employee submits leave request via `ApplyLeaveModal`
2. Request stored in `leave_requests` with 'pending' status
3. HR Manager receives notification and reviews request
4. Approval/rejection updates request status
5. Approved requests deduct from `leave_balances`
6. Balance changes logged in `leave_balance_history`

### Payroll Processing
1. Attendance data aggregated monthly
2. Overtime calculations based on `company_settings` (shift times, OT divisor)
3. Salary components: basic salary + allowance + OT amounts
4. Loan deductions applied if active loans exist
5. Final payroll record created with payment tracking

### Evaluation System
- **Bi-annual Evaluations**: Formal performance reviews with multiple parameters
- **Daily Evaluations**: Quick feedback between team members
- **Scoring**: Configurable parameters with min/max scores
- **Visibility**: Role-based access to evaluation data

## Technical Patterns and Conventions

### Component Patterns
- **Compound Components**: UI components like Command, Popover follow compound pattern
- **Forward Refs**: Interactive components use `forwardRef` for ref forwarding
- **Generic Props**: Flexible components accept generic type parameters

### Data Fetching
- **React Query**: All API calls use TanStack Query for caching and synchronization
- **Query Keys**: Hierarchical query keys for cache invalidation
- **Optimistic Updates**: UI updates immediately, rolls back on error

### Form Handling
- **React Hook Form**: Declarative form validation and submission
- **Zod Schemas**: Runtime type validation matching TypeScript types
- **Controlled Components**: All form inputs are controlled

### State Management
- **Context + Hooks**: Authentication state managed globally
- **Local State**: Component-specific state with useState/useReducer
- **Server State**: API data managed with React Query

### Error Handling
- **Try/Catch**: Async operations wrapped in error boundaries
- **Toast Notifications**: User-friendly error messages via Sonner
- **Loading States**: Skeleton components and loading indicators

### Styling Approach
- **Design Tokens**: CSS custom properties for consistent theming
- **Utility Classes**: Tailwind for rapid styling
- **Component Variants**: shadcn/ui pattern for component variations
- **Responsive Design**: Mobile-first approach with responsive utilities

### File Organization
- **Feature-based**: Components organized by feature domains
- **Shared UI**: Common components in `ui/` directory
- **Utilities**: Helper functions in `lib/` directory
- **Types**: Centralized in integration directories

This comprehensive HR system demonstrates modern React application architecture with enterprise-grade features and robust data management.
